# Vendored Runtime Libraries

These pinned browser builds keep Plotypus usable without a network connection.

| Library | Version | File | License | Source |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| D3 | 7.9.0 | `d3-7.9.0.min.js` | ISC | <https://www.npmjs.com/package/d3/v/7.9.0> |
| Papa Parse | 5.4.1 | `papaparse-5.4.1.min.js` | MIT | <https://www.npmjs.com/package/papaparse/v/5.4.1> |

When upgrading a dependency, update its versioned filename and the matching script reference in `index.html`.
